title: syzygium ampullarium
intro: Syzygium ampullarium, also known as the Balic or Bornean water apple, is a species of flowering plant in the myrtle family. It is native to Borneo and is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Syzygium ampullarium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tea, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
